name: CSS Styles
template:
<style>
    :root {
        --glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        --glass-border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        --primary: #6366f1;
        --secondary: #a855f7;
        --dark: #0f172a;
    }

    body { 
        background: #0f172a; 
        color: #f8fafc;
        font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        margin: 0;
    }

    .hero-bg {
        background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #0f172a, #1e293b, #334155, #0f172a);
        background-size: 400% 400%;
        animation: gradient 15s ease infinite;
    }

    @keyframes gradient {
        0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
        50% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        100% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
    }

    .glass-card {
        background: var(--glass);
        backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
        border: 1px solid var(--glass-border);
        border-radius: 16px;
        transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .glass-card:hover {
        transform: translateY(-10px);
        border-color: var(--primary);
        box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.2);
    }

    .stat-circle {
        width: 80px;
        height: 80px;
        border-radius: 50%;
        background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        margin: 0 auto 15px;
        font-weight: bold;
        box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.4);
    }

    .nav-link { color: #cbd5e1 !important; transition: 0.3s; }
    .nav-link:hover { color: var(--primary) !important; }
    
    .btn-primary-custom {
        background: linear-gradient(to right, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
        border: none;
        padding: 12px 30px;
        border-radius: 50px;
        font-weight: 600;
        transition: 0.3s;
        color: white; text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
    }

    .btn-primary-custom:hover {
        opacity: 0.9;
        transform: scale(1.05);
        color: white;
    }
</style>

name: Sleek Portfolio UI
template:
AMRIT PORTFOLIO
About Skills Experience Live Sandbox Contact
Run Page Test
Available for Freelance & QA Roles

Hi, I'm Amrit Raj.
I Break Code to Build Premium Software Reliability.

A Software Quality Assurance & Automation Engineer specializing in building ultra-robust end-to-end test suites, dynamic performance scaling, and seamless CI/CD quality pipelines.

Test My Website Get In Touch

Interactive Terminal Sandbox

Run an automated end-to-end audit directly on this portfolio page to witness testing live.

PlaywrightRunner@QA-Hub:~
headless: true
// Click the button below to execute play-by-play automated tests...
$ npx playwright test tests/portfolio-verification.spec.ts
Test Suite: 4 Automated Audits idle

The Testing & Development Stack

My specialized core tools, automated testing ecosystems, and development workflows.

Automation Suites

  • Playwright / Cypress Expert
  • Selenium WebDriver Advanced
  • Appium (Mobile) Intermediate

API & Performance

  • Postman & REST Assured Expert
  • JMeter & k6 Load Tests Advanced
  • SoapUI & GraphQL testing Intermediate

CI/CD & DevOps

  • GitHub Actions Advanced
  • Jenkins & Docker Advanced
  • AWS Cloud Infrastructure Intermediate

My Professional Path

A chronicle of my contributions in engineering high-quality releases.

Software Test Engineer

EBot AI Solutions PVT LTD
April 2024 - Present

Built custom headless Playwright pipelines reducing test runtime by over 45%. Oversaw a robust manual-to-automation shift, increasing feature verification velocity.

QA Intern

Test Yantra
June 2023 - March 2024

Authored and executed over 1,500 integration and sanity checks. Integrated Jenkins CI automation ensuring zero critical escapes reaching customer releases.

4,500+ Bugs Logged & Fixed
99.8% Production Code Coverage
350+ Automated Test Scripts
0% Critical Escapes Rate

Connect & Start Collaborating

Have a project or a platform that needs precise validation? Reach out today!

© 2026 QA Portfolio Portal. Engineered using modern Node-RED backend controllers.

// Async Form Handler document.getElementById('contact-form').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) { e.preventDefault(); const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type="submit"]'); const originalContent = btn.innerHTML; // Set Loading state btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = ` Routing Message...`; const payload = { name: document.getElementById('contact-name').value, email: document.getElementById('contact-email').value, message: document.getElementById('contact-message').value }; try { const response = await fetch('/portfolio-contact', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) }); if (response.ok) { btn.innerHTML = ` Message Logged!`; btn.className = "w-full py-4 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-xl font-bold shadow-lg transition-colors"; e.target.reset(); } else { throw new Error('Endpoint failure'); } } catch (err) { btn.innerHTML = ` Route Blocked (Error)`; btn.className = "w-full py-4 bg-rose-600 text-white rounded-xl font-bold shadow-lg transition-colors"; } // Reset to default button state after 4 seconds setTimeout(() => { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = originalContent; btn.className = "w-full py-4 bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-500 text-white rounded-xl font-bold shadow-lg shadow-indigo-600/10 transition-colors"; }, 4000);

name: Build Alert Messages
Sleek Portfolio UI
template:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Amrit Raj — QA Engineer</title>
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Mono:wght@400;500&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.2/font/bootstrap-icons.css">
    <style>
        *,
        *::before,
        *::after {
            box-sizing: border-box;
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
        }

        :root {
            --bg: #04070f;
            --surface: #080e1c;
            --border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07);
            --accent: #4f8cff;
            --accent2: #a78bfa;
            --accent3: #34d399;
            --text: #e2e8f0;
            --muted: #64748b;
            --card: rgba(10, 16, 32, 0.7);
        }

        html {
            scroll-behavior: smooth;
        }

        body {
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg);
            color: var(--text);
            min-height: 100vh;
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* Noise texture overlay */
        body::before {
            content: '';
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 999;
            opacity: 0.4;
        }

        /* ── NAV ── */
        nav {
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            z-index: 100;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0 clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 4rem);
            height: 64px;
            background: rgba(4, 7, 15, 0.85);
            backdrop-filter: blur(16px);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .nav-logo {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            color: var(--text);
            text-decoration: none;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
        }

        .nav-logo span {
            width: 28px;
            height: 28px;
            background: var(--accent);
            border-radius: 6px;
            display: grid;
            place-items: center;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: #fff;
        }

        .nav-links {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 2rem;
            list-style: none;
        }

        .nav-links a {
            color: var(--muted);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: color 0.2s;
            letter-spacing: 0.02em;
        }

        .nav-links a:hover {
            color: var(--text);
        }

        .nav-cta {
            padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
            background: var(--accent);
            color: #fff !important;
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 0.8rem !important;
            font-weight: 600 !important;
            transition: opacity 0.2s !important;
        }

        .nav-cta:hover {
            opacity: 0.85;
            color: #fff !important;
        }

        /* ── HERO ── */
        #hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: clamp(6rem, 12vh, 10rem) clamp(1.5rem, 8vw, 8rem) 4rem;
            position: relative;
        }

        .hero-badge {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--accent3);
            border: 1px solid rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.25);
            padding: 0.4rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            width: fit-content;
        }

        .hero-badge::before {
            content: '';
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
            background: var(--accent3);
            border-radius: 50%;
            animation: pulse 2s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes pulse {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0.3;
            }
        }

        .hero-sub {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: clamp(0.85rem, 2vw, 1rem);
            color: var(--muted);
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
        }

        .hero-title {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 8vw, 7rem);
            font-weight: 800;
            line-height: 0.95;
            letter-spacing: -0.03em;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            color: #fff;
        }

        .hero-title .accent {
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        .typing-wrapper {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2.5vw, 1.4rem);
            color: var(--accent2);
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        #typed-text {
            min-width: 1px;
        }

        .cursor {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 2px;
            height: 1.2em;
            background: var(--accent2);
            animation: blink 1s infinite;
        }

        @keyframes blink {

            0%,
            100% {
                opacity: 1;
            }

            50% {
                opacity: 0;
            }
        }

        .hero-desc {
            font-size: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.15rem);
            color: var(--muted);
            max-width: 520px;
            line-height: 1.7;
            margin-bottom: 3rem;
        }

        .hero-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 3.5rem;
        }

        .btn-primary {
            padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
            background: var(--accent);
            color: #fff;
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.25);
        }

        .btn-primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.35);
        }

        .btn-ghost {
            padding: 0.85rem 2rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            color: var(--text);
            border-radius: 10px;
            text-decoration: none;
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
        }

        .btn-ghost:hover {
            border-color: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.4);
            background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.06);
        }

        .hero-socials {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1.4rem;
            align-items: center;
        }

        .hero-socials a {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
        }

        .hero-socials a:hover {
            color: var(--accent);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* Decorative large text */
        .hero-bg-text {
            position: absolute;
            right: -2rem;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(6rem, 18vw, 18rem);
            font-weight: 800;
            color: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.04);
            letter-spacing: -0.05em;
            pointer-events: none;
            user-select: none;
            line-height: 1;
        }

        /* ── SECTIONS ── */
        section {
            padding: clamp(4rem, 8vh, 7rem) clamp(1.5rem, 8vw, 8rem);
        }

        .section-label {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.15em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--accent);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .section-title {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.5rem);
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: -0.03em;
            line-height: 1.05;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            color: #fff;
        }

        .section-title em {
            font-style: normal;
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        /* ── ABOUT ── */
        #about .about-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 4rem;
            align-items: center;
            margin-top: 3.5rem;
        }

        .about-text p {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 1.05rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
        }

        .about-text p strong {
            color: var(--text);
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .stats-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 1px;
            background: var(--border);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .stat-item {
            background: var(--card);
            padding: 2rem 1.5rem;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .stat-num {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-size: 2.5rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: -0.04em;
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }

        .stat-label {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
        }

        /* ── EXPERIENCE ── */
        #experience {
            background: var(--surface);
        }

        .exp-list {
            margin-top: 3.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0;
        }

        .exp-item {
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            padding: 2.5rem 0;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr auto;
            gap: 2rem;
            align-items: start;
            cursor: default;
            transition: background 0.2s;
        }

        .exp-item:last-child {
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .exp-item:hover {
            background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.03);
            margin: 0 -2rem;
            padding-left: 2rem;
            padding-right: 2rem;
        }

        .exp-date {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            padding-top: 0.3rem;
        }

        .exp-company {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 1.25rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
            color: #fff;
        }

        .exp-role {
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            color: var(--accent);
            font-weight: 500;
            margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
        }

        .exp-desc {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            line-height: 1.7;
        }

        .exp-arrow {
            font-size: 1.5rem;
            color: var(--border);
            transition: color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
            padding-top: 0.2rem;
        }

        .exp-item:hover .exp-arrow {
            color: var(--accent);
            transform: translate(4px, -4px);
        }

        /* ── PROJECTS ── */
        .projects-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(340px, 1fr));
            gap: 1.5px;
            background: var(--border);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 20px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-top: 3.5rem;
        }

        .project-card {
            background: var(--card);
            padding: 2rem;
            transition: background 0.25s;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .project-card::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 2px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--accent), var(--accent2));
            transform: scaleX(0);
            transition: transform 0.3s;
        }

        .project-card:hover::before {
            transform: scaleX(1);
        }

        .project-card:hover {
            background: rgba(15, 22, 45, 0.9);
        }

        .project-num {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
        }

        .project-name {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #fff;
            margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
        }

        .project-desc {
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            line-height: 1.65;
            margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
        }

        .project-tags {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
        }

        .tag {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            padding: 0.25rem 0.65rem;
            background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.08);
            color: var(--accent);
            border: 1px solid rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.15);
            border-radius: 999px;
        }

        .project-metrics {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .metric {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            color: var(--accent3);
        }

        .metric span {
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        /* ── SKILLS ── */
        #skills {
            background: var(--surface);
        }

        .skills-container {
            margin-top: 3.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 2.5rem;
        }

        .skill-group-label {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            letter-spacing: 0.12em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--muted);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            border-left: 2px solid var(--accent);
            padding-left: 0.8rem;
        }

        .skill-chips {
            display: flex;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 0.6rem;
        }

        .skill-chip {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 8px;
            font-size: 0.875rem;
            color: var(--text);
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
        }

        .skill-chip:hover {
            border-color: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.4);
            background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.08);
            transform: translateY(-1px);
        }

        .skill-chip .dot {
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .dot-blue {
            background: var(--accent);
        }

        .dot-purple {
            background: var(--accent2);
        }

        .dot-green {
            background: var(--accent3);
        }

        /* ── TERMINAL ── */
        #sandbox {
            position: relative;
        }

        .terminal-wrap {
            margin-top: 3.5rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 16px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: #020408;
        }

        .terminal-bar {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04);
            padding: 0.85rem 1.2rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .dot-r {
            background: #ff5f57;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .dot-y {
            background: #febc2e;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .dot-g {
            background: #28c840;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }

        .terminal-file {
            margin-left: 1rem;
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        .terminal-output {
            padding: 1.5rem;
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            line-height: 1.8;
            min-height: 280px;
            max-height: 400px;
            overflow-y: auto;
        }

        .terminal-output::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 4px;
        }

        .terminal-output::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: #1e293b;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }

        .t-muted {
            color: #334155;
        }

        .t-blue {
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        .t-green {
            color: var(--accent3);
        }

        .t-purple {
            color: var(--accent2);
        }

        .t-white {
            color: #f1f5f9;
        }

        .t-red {
            color: #f87171;
        }

        .terminal-footer {
            padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 1rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
        }

        .t-status {
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            padding: 0.3rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            letter-spacing: 0.1em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .status-idle {
            background: rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.12);
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        .status-running {
            background: rgba(254, 188, 46, 0.12);
            color: #febc2e;
        }

        .status-passed {
            background: rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.12);
            color: var(--accent3);
        }

        .run-btn {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            padding: 0.65rem 1.4rem;
            background: var(--accent3);
            color: #000;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
        }

        .run-btn:hover:not(:disabled) {
            opacity: 0.85;
            transform: translateY(-1px);
        }

        .run-btn:disabled {
            opacity: 0.5;
            cursor: not-allowed;
        }

        /* ── CONTACT ── */
        #contact .contact-inner {
            margin-top: 3.5rem;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 4rem;
            align-items: start;
        }

        .contact-cta-text {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 2.5rem);
            font-weight: 800;
            line-height: 1.15;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            color: #fff;
        }

        .contact-links {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 1rem;
        }

        .contact-link-item {
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 1rem;
            padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            text-decoration: none;
            color: var(--text);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02);
            transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
        }

        .contact-link-item:hover {
            border-color: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.35);
            background: rgba(79, 140, 255, 0.06);
            transform: translateX(4px);
        }

        .contact-link-item i {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            color: var(--accent);
            width: 24px;
        }

        .contact-form-side input,
        .contact-form-side textarea {
            width: 100%;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.03);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 0.875rem 1rem;
            color: var(--text);
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            outline: none;
            transition: border-color 0.2s;
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .contact-form-side input:focus,
        .contact-form-side textarea:focus {
            border-color: var(--accent);
        }

        .contact-form-side textarea {
            min-height: 130px;
            resize: vertical;
        }

        .form-label {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            font-family: 'DM Mono', monospace;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
        }

        .form-submit {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 0.9rem;
            background: var(--accent);
            color: #fff;
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 10px;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: opacity 0.2s;
        }

        .form-submit:hover:not(:disabled) {
            opacity: 0.85;
        }

        .form-submit:disabled {
            opacity: 0.6;
        }

        /* ── FOOTER ── */
        footer {
            padding: 2.5rem clamp(1.5rem, 8vw, 8rem);
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            gap: 1rem;
        }

        footer p {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--muted);
        }

        footer .foot-socials {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1.2rem;
        }

        footer .foot-socials a {
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: color 0.2s;
        }

        footer .foot-socials a:hover {
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        /* ── ANIMATIONS ── */
        .reveal {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(28px);
            transition: opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease;
        }

        .reveal.in {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }

        /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
        @media (max-width: 860px) {

            #about .about-grid,
            #contact .contact-inner {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 2.5rem;
            }

            .exp-item {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
                gap: 0.5rem;
            }

            .exp-arrow {
                display: none;
            }

            .hero-bg-text {
                display: none;
            }

            .nav-links {
                display: none;
            }
        }

        @media (max-width: 520px) {
            .projects-grid {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>

        <div class="hero-actions">

    <!-- ABOUT -->
    <section id="about">
        <p class="section-label reveal">Who I Am</p>
        <h2 class="section-title reveal">Builder. <em>Breaker.</em> Reliability Nerd.</h2>

        <div class="about-grid">
            <div class="about-text reveal">
                <p>I'm <strong>Amrit</strong> — a QA Automation Engineer who got obsessed with making software fail
                    gracefully <em>before</em> it reaches production. Currently at <strong>EBot AI Solutions</strong>,
                    where I ship headless Playwright pipelines that reduced test runtime by 45%.</p>
                <p>What actually excites me? <strong>Designing test architectures that think.</strong> From performance
                    benchmarks under load to visual regression diffs — I build systems that catch the subtle bugs that
                    manual testers miss at 2 AM on release night.</p>
                <p>I'm the kind of engineer who automates their own automation. My weekends involve
                    <strong>writing Cypress scripts, benchmarking k6 scenarios</strong>, and figuring out if an idea
                    holds up at 10,000 concurrent users.</p>
            </div>

            <div class="stats-grid reveal">
                <div class="stat-item">
                    <span class="stat-num" style="color: var(--accent)">4,500+</span>
                    <span class="stat-label">Bugs Logged</span>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-item">
                    <span class="stat-num" style="color: var(--accent2)">99.8%</span>
                    <span class="stat-label">Code Coverage</span>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-item">
                    <span class="stat-num" style="color: var(--accent3)">350+</span>
                    <span class="stat-label">Test Scripts</span>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-item">
                    <span class="stat-num" style="color: #f87171">0%</span>
                    <span class="stat-label">Critical Escapes</span>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- EXPERIENCE -->
    <section id="experience">
        <p class="section-label reveal">Work</p>
        <h2 class="section-title reveal">Where I've <em>Been Building</em></h2>

        <div class="exp-list">
            <div class="exp-item reveal">
                <div class="exp-date">Apr 2024 – Present</div>
                <div>
                    <div class="exp-company">EBot AI Solutions PVT LTD</div>
                    <div class="exp-role">Software Test Engineer</div>
                    <div class="exp-desc">
                        Built custom headless Playwright pipelines reducing test runtime by over 45%. Oversaw a robust
                        manual-to-automation migration, increasing feature verification velocity across CI/CD.
                        Introduced performance baselining with k6, catching regression spikes before production deploys.
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="exp-arrow">↗</div>
            </div>

            <div class="exp-item reveal">
                <div class="exp-date">Jun 2023 – Mar 2024</div>
                <div>
                    <div class="exp-company">Test Yantra</div>
                    <div class="exp-role">QA Intern</div>
                    <div class="exp-desc">
                        Authored and executed over 1,500 integration and sanity checks across multiple product
                        verticals. Integrated Jenkins CI automation, ensuring zero critical escapes reaching customer
                        releases. Gained deep proficiency in API testing with Postman and REST Assured.
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="exp-arrow">↗</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- PROJECTS -->
    <section id="projects">
        <p class="section-label reveal">Personal Work</p>
        <h2 class="section-title reveal">Things I've <em>Built & Broken</em></h2>

        <div class="projects-grid">
            <div class="project-card reveal">
                <div class="project-num">01 / Automation</div>
                <div class="project-name">Headless E2E Playwright Pipeline</div>
                <p class="project-desc">Full CI-integrated end-to-end test suite covering auth flows, dashboard
                    interactions, and API contract checks — running headless in GitHub Actions on every PR merge.</p>
                <div class="project-tags">
                    <span class="tag">Playwright</span>
                    <span class="tag">TypeScript</span>
                    <span class="tag">GitHub Actions</span>
                    <span class="tag">Docker</span>
                </div>
                <div class="project-metrics">
                    <div class="metric">Runtime <span>↓45%</span></div>
                    <div class="metric">Coverage <span>98%</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="project-card reveal">
                <div class="project-num">02 / Performance</div>
                <div class="project-name">k6 Load Testing Framework</div>
                <p class="project-desc">Scalable load-testing framework simulating 10,000+ concurrent users. Produces
                    automated HTML reports with P95/P99 latency breakdowns and throughput graphs.</p>
                <div class="project-tags">
                    <span class="tag">k6</span>
                    <span class="tag">JavaScript</span>
                    <span class="tag">InfluxDB</span>
                    <span class="tag">Grafana</span>
                </div>
                <div class="project-metrics">
                    <div class="metric">Users <span>10k+ simulated</span></div>
                    <div class="metric">P99 <span>monitored</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="project-card reveal">
                <div class="project-num">03 / API</div>
                <div class="project-name">REST API Contract Test Suite</div>
                <p class="project-desc">Postman + REST Assured collection covering 200+ endpoints with schema
                    validation, auth token flows, and negative test cases. Integrated into Jenkins nightly builds.</p>
                <div class="project-tags">
                    <span class="tag">Postman</span>
                    <span class="tag">REST Assured</span>
                    <span class="tag">Java</span>
                    <span class="tag">Jenkins</span>
                </div>
                <div class="project-metrics">
                    <div class="metric">Endpoints <span>200+</span></div>
                    <div class="metric">Escapes <span>0 critical</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="project-card reveal">
                <div class="project-num">04 / Mobile</div>
                <div class="project-name">Appium Cross-Device Test Grid</div>
                <p class="project-desc">Multi-device Appium grid testing native Android and iOS flows in parallel, wired
                    to BrowserStack for real-device matrix coverage across 25+ device/OS combinations.</p>
                <div class="project-tags">
                    <span class="tag">Appium</span>
                    <span class="tag">BrowserStack</span>
                    <span class="tag">Python</span>
                    <span class="tag">Selenium Grid</span>
                </div>
                <div class="project-metrics">
                    <div class="metric">Devices <span>25+ combos</span></div>
                    <div class="metric">Parallel <span>enabled</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="project-card reveal">
                <div class="project-num">05 / CI/CD</div>
                <div class="project-name">Quality Gate Pipeline</div>
                <p class="project-desc">End-to-end GitHub Actions quality gate — lint, unit tests, integration tests,
                    visual regression, and performance budget checks — all blocking merge on failure.</p>
                <div class="project-tags">
                    <span class="tag">GitHub Actions</span>
                    <span class="tag">Docker</span>
                    <span class="tag">AWS S3</span>
                    <span class="tag">Slack Alerts</span>
                </div>
                <div class="project-metrics">
                    <div class="metric">Release confidence <span>↑</span></div>
                    <div class="metric">Manual QA <span>↓70%</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="project-card reveal">
                <div class="project-num">06 / Visual</div>
                <div class="project-name">Visual Regression Diff Tool</div>
                <p class="project-desc">Pixel-level screenshot comparison tool using Playwright + Percy, automatically
                    flagging UI regressions in PRs with annotated diff images attached to GitHub comments.</p>
                <div class="project-tags">
                    <span class="tag">Playwright</span>
                    <span class="tag">Percy</span>
                    <span class="tag">Node.js</span>
                    <span class="tag">GitHub API</span>
                </div>
                <div class="project-metrics">
                    <div class="metric">Pixel diffs <span>auto-flagged</span></div>
                    <div class="metric">PR feedback <span>instant</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- SANDBOX -->
    <section id="sandbox">
        <p class="section-label reveal">Live Demo</p>
        <h2 class="section-title reveal">Interactive <em>Test Sandbox</em></h2>
        <p class="reveal" style="color: var(--muted); max-width: 520px; line-height: 1.7; margin-top: 0.5rem;">

        </p>

        <div class="terminal-wrap reveal">

                <div class="dot-y"></div>

                    <span class="t-status status-idle" id="t-badge">idle</span>

            </button>

        var currentBotId = "68f0f460c682d3e04573ec2f";

    <script>
        // ── TYPING EFFECT ──
const phrases = [
    "I automate the chaos.",
    "I build test pipelines.",
    "I break code on purpose.",
    "I ship quality, not bugs.",
    "Playwright · Cypress · k6"
];
let pi = 0, ci = 0, deleting = false;
const el = document.getElementById('typed-text');

function type() {
    const word = phrases[pi];
    el.textContent = deleting ? word.slice(0, --ci) : word.slice(0, ++ci);
    if (!deleting && ci === word.length) { setTimeout(() => deleting = true, 1800); }
    else if (deleting && ci === 0) { deleting = false; pi = (pi + 1) % phrases.length; }
    setTimeout(type, deleting ? 45 : 80);
}
type();

// ── SCROLL REVEAL ──
const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('in'); } });
}, { threshold: 0.12 });
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

// ── TERMINAL TEST ──
function runTests() {
    const btn = document.getElementById('run-btn');
    const out = document.getElementById('terminal-stdout');
    const badge = document.getElementById('t-badge');
    if (btn.disabled) return;

    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-arrow-clockwise"></i> Running...';
    badge.className = 't-status status-running';
    badge.textContent = 'running';
    out.innerHTML = '';

    const lines = [
        { cls: 't-muted', text: '[INFO] Launching Playwright v1.44.0 (Chromium headless)...' },
        { cls: 't-blue',  text: '[INFO] Target: http://localhost:1880/portfolio' },
        { cls: 't-white', text: '  ● TEST 1 — Page load & HTTP 200 status check' },
        { cls: 't-green', text: '    ✔  PASS — HTTP 200 returned in 312ms' },
        { cls: 't-white', text: '  ● TEST 2 — Navigation links resolve correctly' },
        { cls: 't-green', text: '    ✔  PASS — All 6 anchor hrefs validated' },
        { cls: 't-white', text: '  ● TEST 3 — Responsive layout (sm / md / lg breakpoints)' },
        { cls: 't-green', text: '    ✔  PASS — Flexbox containers match all breakpoints' },
        { cls: 't-white', text: '  ● TEST 4 — Contact form validation & submission event' },
        { cls: 't-green', text: '    ✔  PASS — Required field guards firing correctly' },
        { cls: 't-white', text: '  ● TEST 5 — DOM event hooks & JS listener integrity' },
        { cls: 't-green', text: '    ✔  PASS — All interactive elements responding' },
        { cls: 't-white', text: '  ● TEST 6 — Visual regression pixel diff check' },
        { cls: 't-green', text: '    ✔  PASS — 0 pixel mismatches vs baseline' },
        { cls: 't-muted', text: '──────────────────────────────────────────────' },
        { cls: 't-white', text: 'RESULT SUMMARY' },
        { cls: 't-green', text: '  ✔ 6 Passed   ✖ 0 Failed   ⏱ 2.4s total' },
        { cls: 't-blue',  text: '[EXIT] Playwright exited cleanly — status 0' },
    ];

    let d = 0;
    lines.forEach(l => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            const div = document.createElement('div');
            div.className = l.cls;
            div.textContent = l.text;
            out.appendChild(div);
            out.scrollTop = out.scrollHeight;
        }, d);
        d += 320;
    });

    setTimeout(() => {
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="bi bi-arrow-repeat"></i> Run Again';
        badge.className = 't-status status-passed';
        badge.textContent = 'passed';
    }, d);
}

// ── CONTACT FORM ──
document.getElementById('contact-form').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const btn = document.getElementById('form-btn');
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = 'Sending...';

    const payload = {
        name: document.getElementById('c-name').value,
        email: document.getElementById('c-email').value,
        message: document.getElementById('c-msg').value
    };

    try {
        const res = await fetch('/portfolio-contact', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify(payload)
        });
        if (res.ok) {
            btn.textContent = '✔ Message Sent!';
            btn.style.background = '#34d399';
            this.reset();
        } else throw new Error();
    } catch {
        btn.textContent = '✖ Failed — try email directly';
        btn.style.background = '#f87171';
    }

    setTimeout(() => {
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.textContent = 'Send Message';
        btn.style.background = '';
    }, 4000);
});
    </script>
</body>

</html>
